headline: L3Harris Gains From Strong Defense Spending & Global Demand
summary: LHX rides rising defense spending and global demand, boosting growth prospects, but geopolitical risks and labor shortages could weigh on near-term performance.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider L3Harris Technologies (LHX) After Strong Share Price Gains?
summary: If you are wondering whether L3Harris Technologies is still reasonably priced after a strong run, this breakdown will help you make sense of where the value case currently stands. The stock last closed at US$368.38, with returns of 1.1% over 7 days, 6.6% over 30 days, 21.0% year to date, 75.9% over 1 year, 103.9% over 3 years and 107.7% over 5 years. Recent coverage has focused on L3Harris Technologies as a major player in the Aerospace & Defense space. Investors are watching how its role in...

headline: A New U.S. Facility Could Break China’s Grip on Critical Materials
summary: By combining upstream resource partnerships, Canadian rare-earth processing and U.S. metallization and manufacturing, the REAlloys-SRC platform aims to establish a fully allied rare-earth supply chain.

raw.headline: A New U.S. Facility Could Break China’s Grip on Critical Materials

headline: Hegseth says potential $200 billion Iran war spending request could shift: 'Takes money to kill bad guys'
summary: President Donald Trump's National Economic Council director, Kevin Hassett, said Sunday that the war has already cost $12 billion.
